summary: Cavallo Hoof Boot Winter Studs pack (12 studs per pair) adds traction in ice, mud and snow; drill-installed and removable.
Cavallo All-Purpose English Saddle Pad #209 with medical memory foam either side of the spine to support the saddle gullet; weighs one pound.
Cavallo #609 English Wedge Saddle Pad absorbs concussion and lifts weight off the spine with a gradual rise toward the back; favoured by jumpers.
Cavallo #409 English Raised Wither Saddle Pad is thicker at the front, lifting the saddle at the wither to restore balance with shock absorption and weight distribution.
Cavallo Western Built-Up Saddle Pad #809 adds wither padding to balance a forward-tipping saddle, using a Four-Density Solution to arrest concussion.
Cavallo Full Monty Western Saddle Pad #FM1001, designed with Monty Roberts, is two inches longer with memory foam twice as thick as the Western All-Purpose pad.
Cavallo Baseball Cap, a 100% cotton adjustable cap featuring the brand's "Life is Simple" tagline.
Cavallo Break-Away Halter (patent pending) breaks free from dangerous constraint; dual-use with felt-lined noseband and adjustable hardware across sizes.
ELB Hoof Boot replacement Velcro straps for one pair of Cavallo ELB Boots, available in Black or Bling.
TREK Hoof Boot replacement Velcro straps for one pair of Cavallo Trek Boots, available in Black or Green.
Cavallo Support Pads (sold in pairs), moulded TPU insoles that reduce hoof concussion for road, rocky and arena work plus rehab for laminitis and navicular.
Cavallo Stud Application Kit includes 12 hoof boot studs plus a drill-fit application tool for adding traction in ice, mud and snow.
